hyperedges.label: Sorted Agency Team Working on Mindwise

properties.engagement: brand communication strategy + visual identity + content strategy

hyperedges.label: Thambu's Three Business Ventures
hyperedges.rationale: Thambu is the founder/co-founder across all three businesses: RaceSims Solutions Pvt Ltd (sim racing hardware), Mindwise via Lumen Marketing Company (cognitive supplement), and The Edit (prenatal brand co-founded with his wife Aishu). All share operational knowledge and regulatory experience.

hyperedges.label: Mindwise Brand Identity Development Pipeline
hyperedges.rationale: The full brand identity pipeline for Mindwise: Sorted Agency (Binita as packaging lead, Manik as design/ops) locked Logo Route 3 (Architecture of Intelligence) on Mar 16, selected Patco Pharmaceuticals for custom packaging on Mar 18, built around the tagline 'Your Unfair Advantage' and the brand enemy concept 'Placebo Wellness' established in the brand communication strategy.

hyperedges.label: The Edit Product + Regulatory + Manufacturing Architecture
hyperedges.rationale: The Edit's complete product system: Day 1 launch of Edit For Two (hero couples bundle) + Edit Prenatal, using branded ingredients (Quatrefolic, life'sDHA, Albion chelated minerals), operating under FSSAI FSDU regulatory pathway, with Tanishq Lifecare and Brukem Life Care being evaluated as contract manufacturers. All within ICMR RDA limits to avoid CDSCO drug classification.

hyperedges.label: RaceSims Omnichannel Social Media Growth Strategy
hyperedges.rationale: All seven kits form a unified social media launch strategy for RaceSims, covering every major platform with copy-paste content, growth tactics, and cross-promotion between channels. They share the race-engineer voice and funnel traffic to racesims.in and Discord.

hyperedges.label: RaceSims SEO/GEO Content Pipeline
hyperedges.rationale: The SEO audit identified a critical GEO gap (0% AI crawler optimization). The FAQ content and blog post were created as direct responses, using FAQ schema for AI citation and long-form buyer guides to compete with VRH for high-intent search keywords.

hyperedges.label: RaceSims AI Bot Technology Stack
hyperedges.rationale: The AI assistant is a Node.js application using Claude API as its brain, Meta Cloud API for WhatsApp messaging, Tailscale Funnel for stable public URL, and PM2 for process management. The dashboard provides real-time monitoring. All components form a tightly coupled production system.

hyperedges.label: ARKA-RaceSims Race Engineer Credibility Loop
hyperedges.relation: The race-engineer credibility moat: Thambu works at ARKA Motorsports as a race engineer, builds engineering tools for real race cars (gear ratio calc, wiring manager, WTW suspension all seeded with ARKA Polo data), ARKA wins APRC+INRC races (social media content), and this credibility is RaceSims core USP that VRH cannot copy

hyperedges.label: Thambu Multi-Business Travel Bundle
hyperedges.relation: Voice brief reveals Thambu bundles trips across all three businesses: Coimbatore (ARKA sim setup + rig design with Leela Krishnan), Bangalore (RaceSims dealer motion installs + cladding design at Shahid Moto Mind), Mumbai (customer motion install + Mindwise bottle design at Patco + IMCD extract sourcing). Single founder operating three businesses via travel bundling.

hyperedges.label: KeenMind Expiry Creates Mindwise Market Opportunity
hyperedges.relation: SFI Health 10-year KeenMind agreement with CSIR-CDRI expired Dec 2024, enabling LMC to become the official CDRI-08 licensee in India. CDRI-55 is the new consumer-facing extract brand name (replacing KeenMind branding) to be trademarked by LMC for Mindwise and future distributor agreements.

hyperedges.label: Mindwise Packaging Design System
hyperedges.rationale: All packaging decisions flow from the positioning shift away from scary-drug aesthetic. The 4-side layout, CSIR-CDRI logo placement, tic-tac seal exploration, blister specs, and FSSAI regulatory text all constrain each other and must cohere with the performance brand identity.

hyperedges.label: The Edit Brand Identity System
hyperedges.rationale: The Edit's brand identity is an interlocked system: the name embodies essentialism, the manifesto defines why the brand exists (superseding the narrower couples-equality version), the DTC lifestyle strategy differentiates from Trimacare's pharma model by following Ritual's playbook, and the launch roadmap sequences execution. All gates on the gynecologist co-founder.

hyperedges.label: RaceSims Competitive Moat Execution
hyperedges.rationale: RaceSims' strategy to overtake VRH combines technical moat (CAN bus telemetry proving race-engineer credibility) with community execution (90-day plan centered on Discord server creation + bot deployment) and brand hygiene (fixing the name inconsistency for SEO/AI discoverability). All three threads converge to establish RaceSims as India's credible sim-racing authority.

hyperedges.label: CDRI-08 Clinical Evidence Corpus
hyperedges.rationale: These clinical trials, the safety profile, and the 55% bacoside standardization collectively constitute the regulatory and marketing evidence base for CDRI-08/Mindwise. Each trial tests the same standardized extract at 55%+ bacosides, and together they cover multiple cohorts (young adults, older adults, elderly) and multiple cognitive dimensions. The safety profile rounds out the dossier with toxicology and adverse event data. This cluster is the backbone of every claim Mindwise makes.

hyperedges.label: RaceSims Competitive Execution Stack vs VRH
hyperedges.rationale: These concepts collectively form the multi-front competitive execution plan against VRH. The Discord kit closes the community gap, SEO content and technical fixes close the search gap, Instagram tactics close the social gap, the CSK pitch creates press/content assets, and next-gen rigs plus race-engineer positioning provide the moat none of these depend on alone. Each feeds the others: blog articles multiply into Instagram posts, Discord content leverages the race-engineer voice, CSK content flows to Instagram, and the next-gen rigs generate design-process content for all channels.

hyperedges.label: Mindwise Packaging-Launch Decision Nexus
hyperedges.rationale: The two-track bottle strategy, outer box decision, monochrome+green color scheme, and semi-transparent bottle concept are all interdependent packaging decisions that gate the June 1 launch. Patco executes the bottle, Sorted designs the visuals, and the color scheme must work across both tracks. The outer box decision changes the label layout entirely, which cascades through all design work. These decisions collectively sit on the critical path and any delay in resolving them compresses the production timeline.

hyperedges.label: Mindwise Retention Flywheel
hyperedges.rationale: The 8-12 week science timeline creates a multi-bottle commitment requirement (60 caps = 1 month, need 2-3 bottles). Bundle pricing at Rs.850-900 structurally commits buyers. Community-first education prevents early dropout. These four concepts form a self-reinforcing retention loop where each element makes the others necessary.

hyperedges.label: RaceSims Competitive Moat (Content + Community + Engineering)
hyperedges.rationale: Race engineer positioning is the structural moat. Blog pipeline operationalizes it as SEO content VRH cannot replicate. Discord gap is the community channel where the engineer voice differentiates. CAN bus telemetry is the R&D proof that the moat is real, not just marketing. Together they form the complete competitive defense system.

hyperedges.label: Mindwise Brand Positioning System
hyperedges.rationale: The positioning shift from clinical to performance was the central strategic decision. It solved both the scary drug problem (clinical language alienated youth) and the age paradox (brand must work 18-85). 'Your Unfair Advantage' tagline is the verbal expression. Four cohorts is the audience segmentation it must span. These form an interlocking brand system where changing any one element breaks the others.

hyperedges.label: RaceSims GEO+SEO Competitive Strategy
hyperedges.rationale: GEO content readiness, first-mover advantage, backlink strategy, and race-engineer positioning form a tightly integrated competitive strategy against VRH, all timed to the 90-day execution plan and leveraging the race-engineer USP as a moat across content, SEO, and AI search channels.

hyperedges.label: Mindwise Content & Campaign Architecture
hyperedges.rationale: The three-piece content strategy maps to hero/hub/hygiene framework, instantiated per cohort via campaigns (Kids, Professionals), all laddering to the 'Your Unfair Advantage' tagline and constrained by the 25L annual marketing budget. This is a single integrated content system locked across multiple Sorted meetings.

hyperedges.label: Thambu's Three-Business Portfolio
hyperedges.rationale: Thambu owns RaceSims and Mindwise (via Lumen Marketing Company), and co-founded the prenatal brand with wife Aishu. Cross-domain knowledge transfer is explicit: FSSAI experience from Mindwise applies to prenatal, supplement industry knowledge transfers between brands. The three domain indexes are the architectural spine of this wiki.

hyperedges.label: Bacopa Gummy Supply Chain
hyperedges.rationale: Explicit supply chain described in solusta-puducherry.md: IMCD provides beta-free Bacopa extract to Solista, who manufactures gummies for LMC; Indus provides raw Bacopa/BacoZest materials to Solista as well.

hyperedges.label: RaceSims Premium Brand Portfolio
hyperedges.rationale: Multiple entity pages position these brands in a tiered hierarchy for RaceSims: Moza (entry), Simagic (mid), Conspit (premium), Asetek (premium), VNM (premium+motion). Qubic Systems adds motion platform category at NDA stage.

hyperedges.label: CDRI-08 Global Ownership Transition
hyperedges.rationale: Pier Campanini reports Ginsana/KeenMind sale underway; Andrea Zangara bridges science advisory; CTD Module 2 was originally KeenMind/SFI docs find-replaced for Mindwise/LMC. This is the CDRI-08 asset transitioning from Australian (SFI/KeenMind) to Indian (LMC/Mindwise) ownership with potential disruption from new KeenMind buyer.

hyperedges.label: CDRI-08 Science-to-Market Pipeline
hyperedges.rationale: The full chain from CSIR-CDRI government research (1960s+) through Dr. Hemant Singh's foundational work, Adam Ritson's recovery catalyzing global adoption, to Thambu/Lumen commercializing as Mindwise. This is the core narrative and unfair advantage of the Mindwise brand.

hyperedges.label: RaceSims Moat via ARKA Motorsports
hyperedges.rationale: Thambu's active race engineer role at India's winningest motorsport team (123 titles), mentored by 7-time National Rally Champion Leelakrishnan, with field installer Abdul bridging ARKA to RaceSims, using Conspit premium hardware. This credential stack is uncopyable by VRH or any competitor.

hyperedges.label: Thambu's Three-Business Portfolio
hyperedges.rationale: Thambu owns RaceSims (via Racesims Solutions Pvt Ltd) and Mindwise (via Lumen Marketing Company), with wife Aishu co-directing RaceSims and founding the prenatal brand. Shared address, shared resources (Shivendra), but separate legal entities, teams, and money.

hyperedges.label: Sorted Agency x Mindwise Brand Partnership
hyperedges.rationale: Sorted Agency's full team (Aarti, Manik, Tanya, Binita, Shipra) engaged with Thambu and Shivendra to deliver Mindwise brand strategy, visual identity, content strategy, and packaging. This is the central creative partnership driving Mindwise's 2026 launch.

hyperedges.label: Bangalore Dealer + Installer Network
hyperedges.rationale: Two Bangalore dealers (Sim Racing HQ owned by Trayas, Racing Rigs run by Lakshay) plus Abdul as the shared field installer form RaceSims' Bangalore distribution and installation network. Abdul is the geographic leverage that prevents Thambu from being the bottleneck.

hyperedges.label: ARKA Motorsports Credibility Pipeline
hyperedges.rationale: N. Leelakrishnan (7x National Rally Champion) leads ARKA Motorsports where Thambu works as race engineer and Abdul previously worked. This relationship feeds into next-gen RaceSims rig design mentorship and is the hardest-to-copy moat asset in RaceSims' competitive positioning.

hyperedges.label: Mindwise Packaging Workflow
hyperedges.rationale: Patco (vendor) discovered by Shivendra, coordinated by Binita at Sorted, reviewed by Ankita, directed by Thambu. The full packaging pipeline from vendor discovery to label artwork to bottle prototyping runs through these six nodes.

hyperedges.label: CDRI-08 Clinical Evidence Chain
hyperedges.rationale: The CTD references bibliography compiles 6+ human clinical trials that back the 55% bacosides and 8-12 week onset marketing claims. This chain is the compliance backbone ensuring every Mindwise marketing claim traces to peer-reviewed evidence, as verified in lint reports.

hyperedges.label: RaceSims Competitive Strategy Arc
hyperedges.rationale: The VRH battle plan and SEO/GEO audit (sister documents, same date) together define the competitive strategy: race-engineer positioning as moat, SEO content gap as the biggest weakness, GEO first-mover as an asymmetric opportunity, and Moza keyword competition as a specific battleground. Blog content pipeline is the execution vehicle.

hyperedges.label: 5-Meeting Brand Strategy Arc (Jan-Feb 2026)
hyperedges.rationale: The 5 foundational meetings trace a complete strategic arc from clinical supplement positioning to performance brand, locking tagline, visual identity, and campaign frameworks in sequence. Each meeting's output became the input for the next.

hyperedges.label: June 1 Launch Countdown Coordination (Mar-Apr 2026)
hyperedges.rationale: Between March 24 and April 11, all operational threads converge on the June 1 deadline: pricing locked, launch plan created, Notion workspace built, travel confirmed, packaging dimensions finalized with Patco, website content approved, and outer box cost decision raised. Dibiz engaged as post-launch marketing agency.

hyperedges.label: CTD Clinical Evidence to Marketing Claims Chain
hyperedges.rationale: The CTD Module 2.5 document is the regulatory backbone proving 55%+ bacosides, 8-12 week onset, and specific cognitive improvements across 7+ trials. These clinical facts feed directly into the 'Your Unfair Advantage' positioning and 'Placebo Wellness' brand enemy frame, with CDRI-55 as the consumer-facing extract name. Every marketing claim must trace back through this chain.

hyperedges.label: LMC-Indus Bacopa Partnership with SE Asia Exclusion
hyperedges.rationale: LMC and Indus agreed on Bacopa formulation work with LMC retaining SE Asia exclusivity where it already operates MemoPlus Gold and Actif Mind

hyperedges.label: CDRI-08 Nonclinical Safety Profile (with gaps and contradictions)
hyperedges.rationale: The nonclinical dossier establishes CDRI-08 safety (LD50 >3000 mg/kg, non-genotoxic) but flags two material issues: the Singh/Patel spermatogenesis contradiction and the complete absence of carcinogenicity data

hyperedges.label: KeenMind Expiry → Mindwise Replacement for India
hyperedges.rationale: The 10-year KeenMind/SFI agreement expired Dec 2024; Mindwise is the designated replacement CDRI-08 product for the India market

properties.rationale: Sorted tested bottles with team - people felt scared, asked 'should a doctor tell me?'

links.source_file: mindwise/marketing/meetings/05. MindWise Brand communication Strategy/_Mindwise - Brand Communication Strategy (EXT).txt

properties.rationale: Adam's remarkable recovery from brain damage using CDRI-08 became media sensation in Australia, driving commercial interest
Brand looks too clinical/medical - gave blunt feedback that perception needs complete overhaul from pharma to performance
Manik advises strongly against Thambu being brand manager - recommends hiring experienced person or freelancer for 3-6 months
Both are core brand positioning concepts - tagline defines what Mindwise IS, brand enemy defines what it's NOT

links.source_file: mindwise/marketing/meetings/05. MindWise Brand communication Strategy/_Mindwise - Brand Communication Strategy (EXT).txt
mindwise/marketing/meetings/05. MindWise Brand communication Strategy/_Mindwise - Brand Communication Strategy (EXT).txt

properties.rationale: Less information = less scary = more aspirational; green capsules are natural asset to showcase
Logo needed to disrupt brain supplement category which typically uses medicinal/pharmaceutical visual language
Old packaging was clinical/pharma aesthetic with Montserrat fonts and CMYK print-ready files; new direction is semi-transparent modern performance aesthetic
Both are cohort-specific campaigns derived from unified Your Unfair Advantage positioning, sharing the 3-piece framework (brand film + key visuals + sustenance)

properties.detail: Olga's nephew Adam suffered brain damage; she gave high doses experimentally

properties.rationale: Both are international commercial products of the same CDRI-08 extract in different markets
Chemiloids NDA covers Terminalia chebula BPH processing; Diafit trademark appears to be the BPH product brand
Indus NDA covers gummies development and Mindwise has gummy formulation specs using BacoZest
Both are Stough-led Swinburne University CDRI-08 clinical trials, the 2008 being a larger follow-up
File paths reference 'LIFE ESSENCE' directory, indicating packaging was designed under the previous brand name

hyperedges.label: RaceSims Premium Brand Portfolio
hyperedges.rationale: Multiple entity pages position these brands in a tiered hierarchy for RaceSims: Moza (entry), Simagic (mid), Conspit (premium), Asetek (premium), VNM (premium+motion). Qubic Systems adds motion platform category at NDA stage.

hyperedges.label: CDRI-08 Global Ownership Transition
hyperedges.rationale: Pier Campanini reports Ginsana/KeenMind sale underway; Andrea Zangara bridges science advisory; CTD Module 2 was originally KeenMind/SFI docs find-replaced for Mindwise/LMC. This is the CDRI-08 asset transitioning from Australian (SFI/KeenMind) to Indian (LMC/Mindwise) ownership with potential disruption from new KeenMind buyer.

hyperedges.label: CDRI-08 Science-to-Market Pipeline
hyperedges.rationale: The full chain from CSIR-CDRI government research (1960s+) through Dr. Hemant Singh's foundational work, Adam Ritson's recovery catalyzing global adoption, to Thambu/Lumen commercializing as Mindwise. This is the core narrative and unfair advantage of the Mindwise brand.

hyperedges.label: RaceSims Moat via ARKA Motorsports
hyperedges.rationale: Thambu's active race engineer role at India's winningest motorsport team (123 titles), mentored by 7-time National Rally Champion Leelakrishnan, with field installer Abdul bridging ARKA to RaceSims, using Conspit premium hardware. This credential stack is uncopyable by VRH or any competitor.

hyperedges.label: Thambu's Three-Business Portfolio
hyperedges.rationale: Thambu owns RaceSims (via Racesims Solutions Pvt Ltd) and Mindwise (via Lumen Marketing Company), with wife Aishu co-directing RaceSims and founding the prenatal brand. Shared address, shared resources (Shivendra), but separate legal entities, teams, and money.

hyperedges.label: Sorted Agency x Mindwise Brand Partnership
hyperedges.rationale: Sorted Agency's full team (Aarti, Manik, Tanya, Binita, Shipra) engaged with Thambu and Shivendra to deliver Mindwise brand strategy, visual identity, content strategy, and packaging. This is the central creative partnership driving Mindwise's 2026 launch.

hyperedges.label: Bangalore Dealer + Installer Network
hyperedges.rationale: Two Bangalore dealers (Sim Racing HQ owned by Trayas, Racing Rigs run by Lakshay) plus Abdul as the shared field installer form RaceSims' Bangalore distribution and installation network. Abdul is the geographic leverage that prevents Thambu from being the bottleneck.

hyperedges.label: ARKA Motorsports Credibility Pipeline
hyperedges.rationale: N. Leelakrishnan (7x National Rally Champion) leads ARKA Motorsports where Thambu works as race engineer and Abdul previously worked. This relationship feeds into next-gen RaceSims rig design mentorship and is the hardest-to-copy moat asset in RaceSims' competitive positioning.

hyperedges.label: Mindwise Packaging Workflow
hyperedges.rationale: Patco (vendor) discovered by Shivendra, coordinated by Binita at Sorted, reviewed by Ankita, directed by Thambu. The full packaging pipeline from vendor discovery to label artwork to bottle prototyping runs through these six nodes.

hyperedges.label: CDRI-08 Clinical Evidence Chain
hyperedges.rationale: The CTD references bibliography compiles 6+ human clinical trials that back the 55% bacosides and 8-12 week onset marketing claims. This chain is the compliance backbone ensuring every Mindwise marketing claim traces to peer-reviewed evidence, as verified in lint reports.

hyperedges.label: RaceSims Competitive Strategy Arc
hyperedges.rationale: The VRH battle plan and SEO/GEO audit (sister documents, same date) together define the competitive strategy: race-engineer positioning as moat, SEO content gap as the biggest weakness, GEO first-mover as an asymmetric opportunity, and Moza keyword competition as a specific battleground. Blog content pipeline is the execution vehicle.

hyperedges.label: 5-Meeting Brand Strategy Arc (Jan-Feb 2026)
hyperedges.rationale: The 5 foundational meetings trace a complete strategic arc from clinical supplement positioning to performance brand, locking tagline, visual identity, and campaign frameworks in sequence. Each meeting's output became the input for the next.

hyperedges.label: June 1 Launch Countdown Coordination (Mar-Apr 2026)
hyperedges.rationale: Between March 24 and April 11, all operational threads converge on the June 1 deadline: pricing locked, launch plan created, Notion workspace built, travel confirmed, packaging dimensions finalized with Patco, website content approved, and outer box cost decision raised. Dibiz engaged as post-launch marketing agency.

hyperedges.label: CTD Clinical Evidence to Marketing Claims Chain
hyperedges.rationale: The CTD Module 2.5 document is the regulatory backbone proving 55%+ bacosides, 8-12 week onset, and specific cognitive improvements across 7+ trials. These clinical facts feed directly into the 'Your Unfair Advantage' positioning and 'Placebo Wellness' brand enemy frame, with CDRI-55 as the consumer-facing extract name. Every marketing claim must trace back through this chain.

hyperedges.label: LMC-Indus Bacopa Partnership with SE Asia Exclusion
hyperedges.rationale: LMC and Indus agreed on Bacopa formulation work with LMC retaining SE Asia exclusivity where it already operates MemoPlus Gold and Actif Mind

hyperedges.label: CDRI-08 Nonclinical Safety Profile (with gaps and contradictions)
hyperedges.rationale: The nonclinical dossier establishes CDRI-08 safety (LD50 >3000 mg/kg, non-genotoxic) but flags two material issues: the Singh/Patel spermatogenesis contradiction and the complete absence of carcinogenicity data

hyperedges.label: KeenMind Expiry → Mindwise Replacement for India
hyperedges.rationale: The 10-year KeenMind/SFI agreement expired Dec 2024; Mindwise is the designated replacement CDRI-08 product for the India market
